name: Strudel Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Place flour in a bowl. Make a well in the center and add the rest of the ingredients.
2. Stir with a spoon or fork, then knead with your hands, adding more flour as needed.
3. Knead for about 10 minutes or until smooth and elastic. The dough will be sticky but should hold together when shaped.
4. Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover, and let rest at room temperature for about 1 hour.
5. Divide into four balls. Lightly flour a floured tray.
6. Roll out one ball of dough on a floured surface as thin as possible using a rolling pin.
7. Using your hands, carefully lift the dough and begin rolling from the center outward toward the edges in small rolls, maintaining contact with the board to prevent tearing.
8. Stop stretching when there are no more holes visible through the dough.
9. Place filling along the longer edge of the dough, about 1 1/2 inches from the edge.
10. Brush the dough lightly with oil and sprinkle with breadcrumbs. Roll up tightly using the floured side of a cloth or kitchen towel.
11. If making sweet strudel, sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon before rolling.
